title: Giving hope to those who need it most
description: BUSINESS NEWS - In the cold winter months, a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - In the cold winter months, a warm meal, cozy clothing and a safe place to rest can bring a powerful sense of hope and belonging.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - In the cold winter months, a warm meal, cozy clothing and a safe place to rest can bring a powerful sense of hope and belonging."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Sadly, not all Mossel Bay residents and animals are fortunate enough to experience this comfort. That's why Vox and Frogfoot have joined forces to make a difference, offering dignity support and care to the women and children at Creating Effective Families (CEF) in Asla Park, as well as animals at the SPCA, through thoughtful donations and community upliftment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"CEF serves as a safety net for at-risk women and children, providing food, shelter and parenting programmes designed to rebuild lives and strengthen family bonds, free from domestic and social violence.","html":"CEF serves as a safety net for at-risk women and children, providing food, shelter and parenting programmes designed to rebuild lives and strengthen family bonds, free from domestic and social violence."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On 23 August, Vox and Frogfoot will visit CEF to distribute food parcels and other essentials.","html":"On 23 August, Vox and Frogfoot will visit CEF to distribute food parcels and other essentials."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can help too. Drop off your donations of non-perishable food items, warm clothing and pet blankets at Vox offices, 101 York Street, George, as well as at Vox activations, at Bayside Centre from now until 25 August, 23 - 29 September and 21 - 27 October, where donation boxes will be available.","html":"You can help too. Drop off your donations of non-perishable food items, warm clothing and pet blankets at Vox offices, 101 York Street, George, as well as at Vox activations, at Bayside Centre from now until 25 August, 23 - 29 September and 21 - 27 October, where donation boxes will be available."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Together, we can bring more love, more care and more connection to those who need it most.","html":"Together, we can bring more love, more care and more connection to those who need it most."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Giving hope to those who need it most
